title: vulkan-volk bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.4.313.0-1]
- Update to SDK v1.4.313

[1.4.304.0-1]
- Update to 1.4.304.0 SDK

[1.3.283.0-3]
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:

[1.3.283.0-2]
- Bump release for June 2024 mass rebuild

[1.3.283.0-1]
- Update to 1.3.283.0 SDK

[1.3.268.0-2]
- Make vulkan-volk-devel conflict with volk-devel

[1.3.268.0-1]
- vulkan-volk v1.3.268.0
